design_philosophy: Grounded Black-on-Black layers with high-contrast, glowing neon accents for data visualization. A 'Control Room' dashboard prioritizing real-time analytics, unpredictability, and security. Breaks the standard SaaS mold by using terminal-like layouts and sharp, tactical aesthetics.

headings.instruction: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk for headings.

mono.usage: Use extensively for entropy hashes, timestamps, active validator IDs, terminal logs, and data values.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mode B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Dense, strict hierarchy, no wasted space. High utilization of grid-cols and tight gaps.

grid.base: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-[#00F0FF] text-black font-semibold rounded-none px-6 py-2 hover:bg-[#00F0FF]/80 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1E2028] text-white rounded-none px-6 py-2 hover:bg-[#1A1C23] transition-colors
buttons.terminal: bg-[#050505] border border-[#00FF41]/30 text-[#00FF41] font-mono px-4 py-2 uppercase text-xs hover:bg-[#00FF41]/10 transition-colors shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,255,65,0.2)]

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#050505]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#1E2028]

charts.style: Dark background with neon data lines, minimal grid lines (stroke-opacity 0.1).

badges.success: bg-[#00FF41]/10 text-[#00FF41] border border-[#00FF41]/20 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5
badges.warning: bg-[#FF3B30]/10 text-[#FF3B30] border border-[#FF3B30]/20 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5
badges.info: bg-[#00F0FF]/10 text-[#00F0FF] border border-[#00F0FF]/20 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5
badges.inactive: bg-[#1E2028]/50 text-[#52525B] border border-[#1E2028] font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px sharp borders. Avoid overly rounded corners. Limit border-radius to 8px max.

effects.tracing_beam: Active validator cards should use a vibrant border color (#00F0FF) to signify the 'live' node.
effects.glow: Use subtle drop-shadows on primary accents (Cyan/Green) to mimic LED monitors.
effects.scanlines: For the live simulation mode overlay, apply a subtle CSS repeating-linear-gradient overlay to mimic a CRT monitor.

animation_and_motion.data_stream: Use marquee or Framer Motion to animate a continuous vertical/horizontal stream of entropy hex hashes.
animation_and_motion.hover: Instant or fast transitions (150ms). Tech shouldn't feel laggy or overly bouncy.
animation_and_motion.simulation_mode: When '1000-Round fairness simulation' is triggered, display a cinematic overlay with fast-updating numbers, simulating intense computational hashing.

icons.style: Use Phosphor Icons (Regular or Duotone weight) for a technical yet polished look.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
